intro: Orthochilus clandestinus, commonly known as the hidden orchid, is a species of orchid found in tropical regions of Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial properties. Bioactive constituents of Orthochilus clandestinus include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Orthochilus clandestinus is often prepared as a decoction or infusion to treat various ailments, including fever, respiratory infections, and gastrointestinal issues.
